mapper.sql: select t.task_id, t.task_name, t.questionnaire_id, q.questionnaire_name, t.sample_source, t.sampling_method, t.sample_size, t.group_id, t.sampling_batch_no, t.sampling_batch_time, t.sampling_filter_snapshot, t.token_expire_hours, t.send_channels, t.status, t.dispatch_time, t.del_flag, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark from survey_task t left join survey_questionnaire q on q.questionnaire_id = t.questionnaire_id left join sys_user u on u.user_name = t.create_by
mapper.select: select sample_id, task_id, enterprise_id, enterprise_name, credit_code, region_name, industry_category, enterprise_scale, contact_phone, token, token_expire_time, qr_content, status, create_time from survey_task_sample where task_id = #{taskId} order by sample_id

select record_id, task_id, sample_id, enterprise_id, channel, receiver, content, send_status, submit_status, recovery_time, create_time from survey_task_send_record where task_id = #{taskId} order by record_id

select sample_id, task_id, enterprise_id, enterprise_name, credit_code, region_name, industry_category, enterprise_scale, contact_phone, token, token_expire_time, qr_content, status, create_time from survey_task_sample where sample_id = #{sampleId}

select e.enterprise_id, e.enterprise_name, e.credit_code, e.industry_category, e.region_code, e.region_name, e.enterprise_scale, e.contact_name, e.contact_phone, e.status from survey_enterprise e
e.del_flag = '0' and e.status = '0'
and exists ( select 1 from survey_enterprise_group_rel r left join survey_enterprise_group g on g.group_id = r.group_id where r.enterprise_id = e.enterprise_id and ( r.group_id = #{groupId} or ',' || g.ancestors || ',' LIKE '%,' || #{groupId} || ',%' ) )
and e.enterprise_id in
#{enterpriseId}
order by e.enterprise_id
select count(1) from survey_task_send_record where task_id = #{taskId}

select count(1) from survey_task_sample s inner join survey_task t on t.task_id = s.task_id left join sys_user u on u.user_name = t.create_by where t.del_flag = '0' and t.status = '2' and s.status = '1' ${params.dataScope}

select count(s.sample_id) as total_count, count(r.response_id) as submitted_count, count(s.sample_id) - count(r.response_id) as unsubmitted_count, case when count(s.sample_id) = 0 then 0 else round(count(r.response_id) * 100.0 / count(s.sample_id), 2) end as response_rate from survey_task_sample s left join survey_response r on r.sample_id = s.sample_id where s.task_id = #{taskId}

select coalesce(nullif(s.region_name, ''), '未填城市') as region_name, count(s.sample_id) as total_count, count(r.response_id) as submitted_count, case when count(s.sample_id) = 0 then 0 else round(count(r.response_id) * 100.0 / count(s.sample_id), 2) end as response_rate from survey_task_sample s left join survey_response r on r.sample_id = s.sample_id where s.task_id = #{taskId} group by coalesce(nullif(s.region_name, ''), '未填城市') order by response_rate desc, total_count desc, region_name

select s.task_id, s.sample_id, s.enterprise_id, r.response_id, s.enterprise_name, s.credit_code, s.region_name, s.industry_category, s.enterprise_scale, s.contact_phone, s.status as sample_status, coalesce(sr.send_status, '') as send_status, coalesce(sr.submit_status, case when r.response_id is null then '0' else '1' end) as submit_status, sr.send_time, coalesce(sr.recovery_time, r.submit_time) as submit_time, sr.recovery_time, s.token_expire_time from survey_task_sample s left join survey_response r on r.sample_id = s.sample_id left join ( select sample_id, min(send_status) as send_status, min(submit_status) as submit_status, min(create_time) as send_time, min(recovery_time) as recovery_time from survey_task_send_record where task_id = #{taskId} group by sample_id ) sr on sr.sample_id = s.sample_id
s.task_id = #{taskId}
AND s.enterprise_name like '%' || #{enterpriseName} || '%'
AND s.region_name like '%' || #{regionName} || '%'
AND s.industry_category like '%' || #{industryCategory} || '%'
AND s.enterprise_scale like '%' || #{enterpriseScale} || '%'
AND r.response_id is not null
AND r.response_id is null
order by s.sample_id
select to_char(submit_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as submit_date, count(1) as submitted_count from survey_response where task_id = #{taskId} group by to_char(submit_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') order by submit_date
mapper.insert: insert into survey_task( task_name, questionnaire_id, sample_source, sampling_method, sample_size, group_id, sampling_batch_no, sampling_batch_time, sampling_filter_snapshot, token_expire_hours, send_channels, status, dispatch_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{taskName}, #{questionnaireId}, #{sampleSource}, #{samplingMethod}, #{sampleSize}, #{groupId}, #{samplingBatchNo}, #{samplingBatchTime}, #{samplingFilterSnapshot}, #{tokenExpireHours}, #{sendChannelsText}, #{status}, #{dispatchTime}, '0', #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update:
update survey_task set del_flag = '2' where del_flag = '0' and task_id in
#{taskId}
mapper.insert:
insert into survey_task_send_record( task_id, sample_id, enterprise_id, channel, receiver, content, send_status, submit_status, recovery_time, create_time ) values
(#{item.taskId}, #{item.sampleId}, #{item.enterpriseId}, #{item.channel}, #{item.receiver}, #{item.content}, #{item.sendStatus}, #{item.submitStatus}, #{item.recoveryTime}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.update: update survey_task_sample set status = '1' where task_id = #{taskId}
